name: Subculture Lit - Ice
description: ★ Rating: 9/10 🎭 Artistic Merit: 9 ✨ Originality: 10 📚 Cultural Significance: 8 💡 Intellectual Depth: 9 Anna Kavan’s Ice is a cold, crackling nightmare of obsession that refuses to settle into genre, delivering a plotless chase through a world being swallowed…
